name: proc_creation_win_susp_file_permission_modifications
raw_query: any where (((process.executable like~ ("*\\cacls.exe", "*\\icacls.exe", "*\\net.exe", "*\\net1.exe")) and (process.command_line like~ ("*/grant*", "*/setowner*", "*/inheritance:r*"))) or (process.executable:"*\\attrib.exe" and process.command_line:"*-r*") or process.executable:"*\\takeown.exe") and (not (process.command_line:"*ICACLS C:\\ProgramData\\dynatrace\\gateway\\config\\connectivity.history /reset" or (process.command_line:"*ICACLS C:\\ProgramData\\dynatrace\\gateway\\config\\config.properties /grant :r *" and process.command_line:"*S-1-5-19:F*") or (process.command_line like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Microsoft VS Code*", "*:\\Program Files\\Microsoft VS Code*")) or (process.command_line like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avira*", "*:\\Program Files\\Avira*"))))
